title: Lebanon complains to Security Council over alleged Israeli use of herbicide

snapshot.title: Lebanon complains to Security Council over alleged Israeli use of herbicide
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Lebanon’s foreign ministry said it had lodged a complaint with the United Nations over Israel’s alleged spraying of herbicide glyphosate in Lebanese territory near the border earlier this year. In a statement circulated on Sunday, the ministry said it had sent a letter to the UN Security Council and the UN secretary-general this week to complain about the incident,
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Lebanon complains to Security Council over alleged Israeli use of herbicide | Arab News
